# Agent Bus — TOMBSTONE

This file has been superseded by [`docs/AGENT_BUS.md`](https://github.com/RajAbey68/BookLets/blob/main/docs/AGENT_BUS.md) on `main` — the single canonical source for the bus protocol, message format, hook configuration, and bootstrapping procedure.

This file remains only so that the `agent-bus` branch retains a non-empty diff against `main`, which keeps **bus PR #32 open** as the live coordination channel. Comments on that PR are still delivered as `<github-webhook-activity>` webhook events to subscribed sessions.

**Do not edit this file** beyond updating the link above if the canonical doc ever moves.
